issues.description: Text says '[Opponent's Turn]' which requires duration 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. This is a duration rule violation.
Condition checks for a Card on board named 'Dressrosa', but text requires Leader to have {Dressrosa} type. Should use 'LeaderHasType' condition with value 'Dressrosa'.
Trigger is 'OnAttacked' but text describes a passive static effect tied to a turn phase, not an attack action. Should use 'Trigger' or remove trigger for passive conditional effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Opponent's Turn] If your Leader has the {Dressrosa} type, this Character gains +3000 power.
